prompt: What should a 15-year-old do to gain muscle and strength: exercise selection, weekly volume, reps/intensity/failure, and calories/macros?
assertions: Recommends building around major compound patterns (squat/press/hinge/row variants)
Suggests a starting volume around 8-12 sets per muscle per week
Recommends training mostly in approximately the 5-12 rep range
Addresses effort/proximity to failure (e.g., 0-2 RIR or close to failure)
Provides protein recommendation around 1.5-2.0 g/kg/day or equivalent
Suggests a moderate weight gain target (around 1% bodyweight/month or slow surplus)
Emphasizes bodyweight/calisthenic movement skill development before heavy barbell loading
